# Feishu/Lark Open Platform Documentation Source Catalog

- Directory source: `https://open.feishu.cn/api/tools/docment/directory_list`
- Source roots: all top-level roots returned by the directory endpoint
- Document pages discovered: 4260
- Document pages mirrored: 4244
- Failed pages: 16
- Roots indexed: Documentation Home, Developer Guides, Development Tutorials, Server API, Client API, Feishu CLI
- Mirror index: `references/open-platform-docs-mirror-index.json`
- Mirror root: `references/open-platform-docs-mirror/`
